title: CleanSpark Sandersville Georgia Data Center Facility
text: CleanSpark operates the Sandersville data center facility in Sandersville, Georgia. In June 2024, CleanSpark acquired five data centers in rural Georgia for $25.8 million in cash, with the Sandersville facility being one of those five data centers. The turnkey operation in Sandersville was acquired from Mawson Infrastructure Group, a bitcoin miner, with room to almost triple its capacity. The facility is located at 1210 S. Harris Street, Sandersville, GA 31082, USA with 250 megawatts of power capacity. CleanSpark finished energizing the first 100 MW of its expansion in Sandersville, Georgia. The facility functions primarily as a bitcoin mining and cryptocurrency data center operation. A New York Times investigation in 2023 found that one CleanSpark-run crypto mining operation in Sandersville used energy equivalent to that of 49,000 households.
